output:
AI-DRAFTED — REQUIRES CLINICIAN REVIEW

Sample HG002_chr20 was processed with the gatk variant caller. The run met the F1 ≥ 0.99 acceptance threshold. SNV precision was 99.9% (validation.snp.precision), recall 99.7% (validation.snp.recall), and F1 99.8% (validation.snp.f1). 61,234 variants were called (provenance.n_variants), with a duplication rate of 6.1% (qc.percent_duplication) as a library-quality indicator. No clinical interpretation of individual variants is provided.

Provenance: git abc1234, GIAB-v4.2.1.

AI-DRAFTED — REQUIRES CLINICIAN REVIEW

Sample HG003_chr20 was processed with the deepvariant variant caller. The run met the F1 ≥ 0.99 acceptance threshold. No clinical interpretation of individual variants is provided.

Provenance: git 7f3a9c1, GIAB-v4.2.1.

AI-DRAFTED — REQUIRES CLINICIAN REVIEW

Sample HG004_chr20 was processed with the gatk variant caller. The run did NOT meet the F1 ≥ 0.99 acceptance threshold; results should not be used until reviewed by a clinician. SNV precision was 98.1% (validation.snp.precision), recall 97.2% (validation.snp.recall), and F1 97.7% (validation.snp.f1). 57,120 variants were called (provenance.n_variants), with an elevated duplication rate of 14.4% (qc.percent_duplication), a possible library-quality concern. No clinical interpretation of individual variants is provided.

Provenance: git 2d10267, GIAB-v4.2.1.

AI-DRAFTED — REQUIRES CLINICIAN REVIEW

Sample HG003_chr20_lowdepth was processed with the gatk variant caller. The run did NOT meet the F1 ≥ 0.99 acceptance threshold; results should not be used until reviewed by a clinician. SNV precision was 99.5% (validation.snp.precision) but recall was lower at 96.0% (validation.snp.recall), giving an F1 of 97.7% (validation.snp.f1); the reduced recall is consistent with lower sequencing depth. 54,300 variants were called (provenance.n_variants), with a duplication rate of 5.5% (qc.percent_duplication). No clinical interpretation of individual variants is provided.

Provenance: git 88ffa3d, GIAB-v4.2.1.

AI-DRAFTED — REQUIRES CLINICIAN REVIEW

This re-run of HG004 passed after the earlier duplication issue was resolved. No clinical interpretation of individual variants is provided.

Provenance: git 2d10267, GIAB-v4.2.1.
